descriptionText: If you are searching for a pedigree yacht that combines Italian craftsmanship, proven seaworthiness, and true comfort, look no further than the Perini Navi 46 for sale 1991. This classic sailing yacht, delivered in late 1991 and known as S/Y Tamarita, is offered for sale and awaits inspection in Athens, Greece. She is presented in good condition, reflecting attentive ownership and regular maintenance, including a significant repaint in 2017 and a documented history of periodic refits from 2010 through 2022.Perini Navi is a household name in the world of sailing superyachts, celebrated for their technical innovation and timeless design. The Perini Navi 46 for sale 1991 stands as a testament to these values, built with a robust steel hull and aluminium superstructure. Her elegant lines and thoughtful configuration are complemented by a host of features that ensure comfort under sail or at anchor, and she continues to turn heads wherever she cruises.On board, Tamarita’s interior is inviting and practical. A spacious main salon, lined with light wood panelling and plush seating, provides a convivial space to relax, socialise, or enjoy the state-of-the-art entertainment system. Large windows flood the interior with natural light, enhancing the open-plan feel which connects seamlessly to the elegant dining area. Thoughtfully designed for both living and entertaining, she features an aft deck with built-in seating and an expansive flybridge equipped with sun pads and a barbecue grill. The swim platform and side boarding ladder facilitate easy access to the water.Key specifications:Builder: Perini NaviName: S/Y TamaritaLength: 151' (46.02m)Beam: 30' 2" (9.19m)Draft: 23' (7.01m)Model Year: 1992Delivery Year: 1991Hull Material: SteelSuperstructure: AluminiumGross Tonnage: 302 GTFlag: GreekEngines: 2 x MTU 640hp Inboard DieselFuel Capacity: 41,100 LCruising Speed: 12 knotsMax Speed: 14 knotsRange: 4,600 nm at 12 knotsGuests: 8 in 4 stateroomsCrew: 8 in 4 cabinsLocation: Athens, GreeceRecent refits: Major repaint 2017, regular upgrades/maintenanceAccommodation is arranged for up to eight guests in four well-appointed staterooms: a master suite, VIP cabin, and two twins. Each cabin is designed for restful nights at sea, while separate crew quarters (for up to eight) ensure high levels of service and privacy.From a technical perspective, the Perini Navi 46 for sale 1991 is fitted with modern systems and robust auxiliary equipment suited to long-distance voyages. She offers efficient cruising at 12 knots and a transatlantic range, powered by twin MTU inboard engines. Sailing systems include North Sails, Bamar furling gear, and Perini’s own winch systems, making her easy to manage under sail.Equipment on board includes comprehensive navigation and communication systems (Furuno, C Plath, B&G), watermaker, laundry, multiple refrigerators/freezers, swimming platform, North Sails ketch rig, and a full suite of safety equipment meeting commercial standards.The Perini Navi 46 for sale 1991 is a proven sailing yacht, ready for her next owner. Lovingly maintained, updated, and always operated to high standards, she presents a superb opportunity for buyers seeking classic style, generous accommodation, and reliable sailing performance. Don't hesitate to contact us for more information or to book a viewing!
descriptionHtml:
If you are searching for a pedigree yacht that combines Italian craftsmanship, proven seaworthiness, and true comfort, look no further than the Perini Navi 46 for sale 1991. This classic sailing yacht, delivered in late 1991 and known as S/Y Tamarita, is offered for sale and awaits inspection in Athens, Greece. She is presented in good condition, reflecting attentive ownership and regular maintenance, including a significant repaint in 2017 and a documented history of periodic refits from 2010 through 2022.

Perini Navi is a household name in the world of sailing superyachts, celebrated for their technical innovation and timeless design. The Perini Navi 46 for sale 1991 stands as a testament to these values, built with a robust steel hull and aluminium superstructure. Her elegant lines and thoughtful configuration are complemented by a host of features that ensure comfort under sail or at anchor, and she continues to turn heads wherever she cruises.

On board, Tamarita’s interior is inviting and practical. A spacious main salon, lined with light wood panelling and plush seating, provides a convivial space to relax, socialise, or enjoy the state-of-the-art entertainment system. Large windows flood the interior with natural light, enhancing the open-plan feel which connects seamlessly to the elegant dining area. Thoughtfully designed for both living and entertaining, she features an aft deck with built-in seating and an expansive flybridge equipped with sun pads and a barbecue grill. The swim platform and side boarding ladder facilitate easy access to the water.

Key specifications:

  • Builder: Perini Navi
  • Name: S/Y Tamarita
  • Length: 151' (46.02m)
  • Beam: 30' 2" (9.19m)
  • Draft: 23' (7.01m)
  • Model Year: 1992
  • Delivery Year: 1991
  • Hull Material: Steel
  • Superstructure: Aluminium
  • Gross Tonnage: 302 GT
  • Flag: Greek
  • Engines: 2 x MTU 640hp Inboard Diesel
  • Fuel Capacity: 41,100 L
  • Cruising Speed: 12 knots
  • Max Speed: 14 knots
  • Range: 4,600 nm at 12 knots
  • Guests: 8 in 4 staterooms
  • Crew: 8 in 4 cabins
  • Location: Athens, Greece
  • Recent refits: Major repaint 2017, regular upgrades/maintenance

Accommodation is arranged for up to eight guests in four well-appointed staterooms: a master suite, VIP cabin, and two twins. Each cabin is designed for restful nights at sea, while separate crew quarters (for up to eight) ensure high levels of service and privacy.

From a technical perspective, the Perini Navi 46 for sale 1991 is fitted with modern systems and robust auxiliary equipment suited to long-distance voyages. She offers efficient cruising at 12 knots and a transatlantic range, powered by twin MTU inboard engines. Sailing systems include North Sails, Bamar furling gear, and Perini’s own winch systems, making her easy to manage under sail.

Equipment on board includes comprehensive navigation and communication systems (Furuno, C Plath, B&G), watermaker, laundry, multiple refrigerators/freezers, swimming platform, North Sails ketch rig, and a full suite of safety equipment meeting commercial standards.

The Perini Navi 46 for sale 1991 is a proven sailing yacht, ready for her next owner. Lovingly maintained, updated, and always operated to high standards, she presents a superb opportunity for buyers seeking classic style, generous accommodation, and reliable sailing performance.
Don't hesitate to contact us for more information or to book a viewing!
